PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Scholtes for Vera Lee (Petitioner).

The Court received the Proof of Subscribing Witness filed this morning but the May 30, 2012 Will was not filed as ordered. Mr. Scholtes explained that there are two Wills, not three and that the holographic Will dated May 30, 2012 has witnesses signed at a later unknown date and that they were the same witnesses on each of the Wills. The Court took the matter under submission and instructed Counsel to file a copy of the May 30, 2012 Will. Bond in the amount of $10,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Continued To Nov-13-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Scholtes specially appearing for Attorney Richard Fong for and with Vera Lee.

Mr. Scholtes stated that he was here to ask for Vera Lee to be appointed as Special Administrator, that they are not ready to advocate for admission of any of the wills and that they need to do some investigation. In addition, he stated that he was asking for Ms. Lee to be appointed with general powers with limited authority and with bond in the amount of $10,000.00, that there are significant properties to be managed, that there is property outside of the Estate in Humboldt County, that he just learned that there may be a third will, that there is no income that he was aware of and that there is $6,165.00 in a checking account. The Court informed Counsel that an ex parte petition for appointment of Ms. Lee as Special Administrator was needed. Counsel argued that the Court has authority to do so with out an ex parte petition. This issue was taken under submission. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to November 13, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that it would like to see a copy of the will filed.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
